project_type: AWS CDK Python application - Event-driven sleep audio pipeline
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, CDK CLI for synthesis
test_framework: pytest with aws_cdk.assertions, fixtures in tests/conftest.py (app and template fixtures)
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && unset NODE_OPTIONS && pyenv local 3.11.15 && cdk synth
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-py-kiro && unset NODE_OPTIONS && pyenv local 3.11.15 && pytest
verification_instructions: 1. Run pytest to confirm all tests pass. 2. Run cdk synth to confirm synthesis succeeds.
setup_instructions: pyenv local 3.11.15 && pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt
environment_constraints: Must unset NODE_OPTIONS before running CDK/pytest (sandbox has proxy bootstrap that breaks jsii). Use pyenv local 3.11.15 for Python 3.11. Network mode is COMMON_DEPENDENCIES so pip install works.
contribution_requirements: TDD-first: write failing tests before implementation. Use L2 constructs. Least-privilege IAM. Update ARCHITECTURE.md after changes. Conventional commit messages (feat:, fix:, etc.).
key_patterns: Stack code in cdk_base/cdk_base_stack.py as single stack class. Tests in tests/unit/ using template fixture from conftest.py. Tests use template.has_resource_properties(), template.find_resources(), template.resource_count_is(). State machine definition is verified by serializing definition to JSON text and asserting strings/positions. IAM policies are verified via Match.array_with() on Policy Statements.
directory_structure: cdk_base/ - stack definitions (cdk_base_stack.py). tests/unit/ - pytest test files using CDK assertions. ARCHITECTURE.md - authoritative system design doc. app.py - CDK app entry point.
